channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Pittsburgh — host of this year's NFL draft — became a sports mecca
item.description: The Pennsylvania city is hosting the draft for the first time in almost 80 years. Pittsburghers say the city's passionate fanbases and winning teams m...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire. And, Trump eases medical marijuana rules
item.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire for three weeks, President Trump says. And, the Trump administration is easing rules on medic...

item.title: Thousands of seafarers stranded by ongoing U.S. blockade on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: As the U.S. blockade on Iranian ports drags on, thousands of seafarers are stranded on ships, and economic shockwaves ripple around the world.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is extended by 3 weeks as tensions rise in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Hezbollah and Israel traded fire just hours after the ceasefire extension was announced, underscoring its fragility.

item.title: 'Self-aware' robots can learn complex tasks by watching humans. Is that a good thing?
item.description: Scientists say they've made a key breakthrough that would allow robots to figure out complex tasks on their own, but experts say it raises questions a...

item.title: US soldier charged with using classified intel to win $400K on Maduro raid is due in court
Tornado barrels through Oklahoma, damaging 40 homes and shutting down roads
item.description: Officials say a powerful tornado that barreled through Oklahoma damaged about 40 homes in one county and sent emergency crews door-to-door in a hard h...

item.title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
item.description: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" wit...

item.title: Correspondents’ Dinner’s biggest moments involve laughs, cringing and high-stakes politics
In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
item.description: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

item.title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
item.description: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

item.title: The Worst Real Estate Investing Advice I’ve Ever Heard
item.description: This is the worst real estate investing advice I’ve ever heard—and I KEEP hearing it. If you go on to any “real estate investing” TikTok page, they sa...

item.title: Another spyware maker caught distributing fake Android snooping apps
item.description: Researchers have found a new case where government authorities used a fake Android app to plant spyware on a target’s phone. The company that allegedl...

item.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
item.description: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, i...

item.title: The Fed’s High-Stakes Power Struggle Affects Much More Than Mortgage Rates
item.description: Something is brewing at the Federal Reserve, and it’s starting to get ugly. For many months, President Trump has been pressuring the Fed to lower the ...

item.title: Michael Zuber: Why the Average American Won’t Make It Without Rentals
item.description: By buying just One Rental at a Time, Michael Zuber was able to replace his entire W-2 income, scale from one rental to four, then to over 80 rental un...

item.title: BiggerPockets Pulse: Investor Sentiment Falls Amid International Turmoil and Renewed Economic Concerns
item.description: Retail investors’ hopes for improved market conditions are fading in the second quarter of 2026, but many investors still plan to actively grow their ...

item.title: Sweeping Zoning Reforms Presents Opportunities For Multifamily Investments
item.description: With the affordability crisis stinging American pocketbooks and small landlords struggling to maintain cash flow amid high interest rates and property...
